钱白在走过孤独的十七年人生后，穿越到当代最火热的热血漫《不尽的逆流》中。
而所携带的系统能做到的仅仅是窥探《不尽的逆流》的评论区...
在得到男三号的身份后，钱白本着“尽力而为”的原则，对一无所知的剧情展开探索与挣扎。
以泽林･鲁鲁巴尔的身份，从孩童开始，走过这段坎坷曲折，波澜壮阔，而又迷茫怅惘的新生...","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e4af7f8acb2b7e7f541e670be097e1ab~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"形容22","author_id":"","book_id":"7121208526222920707","book_name":"成为男三号的热血漫岁月","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384038","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7121211037746987560","read_count":"1","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"100067"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"19","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e4af7f8acb2b7e7f541e670be097e1ab~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779290155&x-signature=5tzlVr9kw9fMwP6wWXni3yoKKAI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2872373675569352","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"899633"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321231555DCAA8545C377887F8D24"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":32},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book
